headline: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Shares Dip 2.5% After Mixed Q1 Results Miss Revenue Estimates While Beating EPS
summary: Ingersoll Rand (IR) beats Q1 2026 EPS estimates but misses revenue, with shares dropping ~2.5% after-market. Organic growth was flat, though full-year guidance remains unchanged.

headline: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Q2 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Additionally, Ingersoll Rand earned a spot on CDP's A list for the second year in a row, recognizing our global environmental leadership and transparency.  And second, it helps broaden our geographical reach as our life science platform is currently underpenetrated in Asia.
